headline: Profit-Taking or Pivot? Adams Asset Advisors Sells $50M in Calumet Shares After a Nearly 200% Run
summary: Calumet, Inc. produces specialty branded products and renewable fuels for industrial and consumer markets across North America and beyond.

headline: Antero Resources Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: AR heads into Q1 2026 results with rising earnings estimates, though volatile gas prices may have pressured performance.
